name: Matt Rocklin
tagline: Dask, open source, and startup life
description: Exploring Matt's writings on distributed computing, open source sustainability, and building Coiled.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing a blog post by Matt Rocklin, creator of Dask and founder of Coiled. He writes about distributed computing, Python, open source software development, and startup experiences.

spiciness.contextPrompt: Matt Rocklin is known for thoughtful takes on open source sustainability, distributed computing, and the realities of building developer tools and startups in the Python ecosystem.
